Author: Shaw Talebi
Title: How to Code 10X Faster Using AI (without the chaos)
Text:
Member-only story
How to Code 10X Faster Using AI (without the chaos)
Outsource the coding, not the thinking
6 min readOct 11, 2025
The AI use case generating the most economic value today is using it to code. If you’re not careful, however, this can end up being more harmful than helpful. Here, I’ll discuss 5 tactics I use to build software 10X faster using AI without the technical debt or painful refactoring.
Coding with LLMs is like driving a Ferrari. If you know what you’re doing, you can go fast. If not, you can have a bad time.
For example, you get GPT-5 to build your entire app in 30 seconds, but…
- You have no idea how it works
- The app breaks every time you make a change
- You spend 3 hours debugging and fixing things (which is longer than just coding it from scratch)
Like many technical issues, however, the root cause isn’t the technology. It’s user error.
